goal: make a project with Agentic ai and also with deployments
refined_goal:
Refined and Clarified Objective:

Develop a project that utilizes agentic AI (AI systems capable of autonomous decision-making and action) and includes the deployment of the solution to a production or accessible environment. The project should demonstrate the practical application of agentic AI by implementing an autonomous agent that performs meaningful tasks, and should include the necessary steps and infrastructure for deploying the agent so it can be accessed and used by end-users or integrated into other systems.
tasks: Define the agentic AI use case and desired autonomous tasks
Design the architecture of the agentic AI system
Select appropriate AI models and frameworks
Develop the autonomous agent logic and decision-making capabilities
Implement interfaces for agent input and output
Test agent functionality and task performance locally
Create a Git repository for the project
Push codebase and Docker configuration to the Git repository
Configure GitHub Actions for CI/CD pipeline
Add automated testing to the repository
Set up build pipeline for Docker images
Configure deployment stages for production environment
Deploy the agentic AI application to AWS
Implement rollback strategy for failed deployments
Document API endpoints or integration methods for end-users
Provide access instructions or integration guides
